_description: GAIA deterministic-tools readiness registry. Single source of truth for /gaia-doctor preflight scan. Each entry declares: probe command (presence), version command (resolution), applies_to_stacks (filter), tier (0/1/2 for scan-fidelity verdict), and per-OS install commands.

_tiers.0: LLM-only — always achievable; requires only core POSIX + jq/yq/python3.
_tiers.1: Pure pip / npm / static-binary — cheap to install on any host; no native toolchain.
_tiers.2: Heavy native or containerized — Homebrew, Docker, or per-language SDK required.

bash.name: bash
bash.environment_warning: macOS ships bash 3.2 by default; orchestrator globstar walks require 4.0+

install.linux: # bash >= 4.0 is standard on Linux; install via apt-get install bash if missing

bash.notes: Environment warning row (⚠) when version < 4.0; otherwise core present.

jq.name: jq
jq.description: JSON processor (every adapter + envelope writer depends on it)

install.linux: apt-get install -y jq || yum install -y jq

jq.notes: Core dependency — every skill that emits JSON envelopes requires it.

yq.name: yq
yq.notes: Core dependency — config-yaml-editor + sprint-state.sh both require it.

python3.name: python3
python3.description: Python 3 runtime (detect-signals + config merge + yaml conversion)

git.name: git
git.notes: Required for /gaia-dev-story branch + push steps; degrades gracefully in non-git CWD.

vulture.name: vulture

install.docker: docker run --rm -v $PWD:/src python:3.11-slim sh -c 'pip install vulture && vulture /src'

vulture.notes: Tier 1 — pure pip install; covers F-10 Python dead-code gap.

pip-audit.name: pip-audit
pip-audit.description: Python dependency CVE audit (PyPI advisory DB)
pip-audit.notes: Tier 1 alternative to grype for Python repos; no native toolchain required.

cyclonedx-bom.name: cyclonedx-bom
cyclonedx-bom.notes: Tier 1 SBOM for Python; alternative to cdxgen + syft.

osv-scanner.name: osv-scanner
osv-scanner.description: Google OSV.dev CVE scanner (single static binary, any stack)
osv-scanner.notes: Tier 1 cross-stack CVE scanner — single static binary, no native toolchain.

cdxgen.name: cdxgen
cdxgen.notes: Tier 1 SBOM — requires Node but otherwise no native deps.

yamllint.name: yamllint
yamllint.notes: Tier 1 — yamllint adapter ships under adapters/yamllint/.

grype.name: grype
grype.description: Container/dep vulnerability scan via Grype DB
grype.version_cmd: grype version -o json 2>/dev/null | jq -r .application 2>/dev/null || grype version 2>/dev/null | awk -F'[: ]+' '/^Version/ {print $2; exit}' || echo unknown
grype.notes: Bundles its own vulnerability DB; ADR-122 / E70-S9 enforce DB-age + checksum trust boundary.

syft.name: syft
syft.description: Anchore Syft SBOM generator (any stack, native binary)
syft.notes: Tier 2 cross-stack SBOM; pairs with grype for the CVE+SBOM pipeline.

spotbugs.name: spotbugs

install.linux: # Download from https://spotbugs.github.io/ or via SDKMAN: sdk install spotbugs

spotbugs.notes: Tier 2 — JVM-only; not-applicable rows for pure-Python or JS stacks.

detekt.name: detekt
detekt.notes: Tier 2 — Android/Kotlin only; ships as adapters/detekt/.

ktlint.name: ktlint
ktlint.notes: Tier 2 — Android/Kotlin only; ships as adapters/ktlint/.

mobsf.name: mobsf
mobsf.description: Mobile Security Framework — Android/iOS static analysis
mobsf.notes: Tier 2 — mobile-only (Android + iOS); ships as adapters/mobsf/.

sarif-multitool.name: Sarif.Multitool
sarif-multitool.description: Microsoft SARIF Multitool — merges + normalizes per-tool SARIF outputs (Phase 7 sarif-merge.sh)
sarif-multitool.probe_cmd: command -v sarif-multitool || command -v dotnet-sarif || command -v Sarif.Multitool
sarif-multitool.version_cmd: sarif-multitool --version 2>/dev/null || dotnet tool list --global 2>/dev/null | grep -E sarif

install.docker: docker run --rm -v $PWD:/src mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0 sh -c "dotnet tool install --global Sarif.Multitool && PATH=$HOME/.dotnet/tools:$PATH sarif-multitool"

sarif-multitool.notes: AF-2026-05-30-4 / Test11 F-25 — required by brownfield Phase 7 sarif-merge.sh; was hand-install only. Requires .NET SDK (8.0+). On hosts without dotnet, the brownfield SARIF merge degrades to single-tool consumption.
